title: 5 Viewing Biller Information
body_text:
5	Viewing Biller Information
5.1	Viewing Biller Information on the EBP Billers Listing
The procedures in this section describe how to determine which billers participate in Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments System. The biller database also provides other information, such as the biller account number format, the biller account verification method, the time frame for settlement to the customerГўВҖВҷs biller account, a list of recent changes to the biller database, and forms financial institutions can download to assist new billers in enrolling in Central 1ГўВҖВҷs Electronic Bill Payments System.
To look up billersГўВҖВҷ information in the EBP Biller Listing:
Go to
https://clients.central1.com
. Enter your username and password, then select
Sign in
. See Figure 1.
Note: 	YouГўВҖВҷll be prompted to enter your username before this page appears if itГўВҖВҷs your first login to the Client Centre, youГўВҖВҷve deleted your cookies, or youГўВҖВҷre using incognito/private browsing.
Figure 1: Client Centre Login
Select
Applications
. See Figure 2.
Figure 2: Accessing Applications on the Client Centre
Select
EBP Biller Listing
. See Figure 3.
Note: 	Applications are grouped by type (e.g., Admin & Support, Payments). If needed, scroll down the page to find the application. If youГўВҖВҷve saved the application as a favourite, it will also appear under ГўВҖВңMy FavouritesГўВҖВқ.
Figure 3: Accessing EBP Biller Listing
Enter the search criteria, sort preferences, and select
Search Billers
. See Figure 4.
Figure 4: EBP Billers Listing
Review the search results page. See Figure 5. The following information is displayed:
ГўВҲВ’
Biller ID
ГўВҲВ’
Biller Name (English and French)
ГўВҲВ’
CCIN
ГўВҲВ’
Category
ГўВҲВ’
Region
ГўВҲВ’
Account Number Format
ГўВҲВ’
Verification Method
ГўВҲВ’
Biller Settlement
ГўВҲВ’
Vendor # (legacy ON) ГўВҖВ“ For Ontario users only.
ГўВҲВ’
Traceable ГўВҖВ“ Indicates if the biller accepts trace requests from Central 1.
ГўВҲВ’
Validate link ГўВҖВ“ Opens a new page to verify the entered account number.
Figure 5: EBP Billers Listing Search Results
To verify an account number, enter the number in the ГўВҖВңEnter account numberГўВҖВқ field, then select
Validate
. See Figure 6.
Figure 6: EBP Billers Listing Validation Page
Select
Export as Excel
(bottom of page) to export the search results from the EBP Billers Listing into Excel. If
Include Biller in Hint Text
is selected, the exported file includes English and French hint text for each biller. If itГўВҖВҷs not selected, the biller list is exported in the existing format without hint text. See Figure 7.
Figure 7: Export as Excel
Select
Updates
on any page to view a list of recent changes to the biller database. See Figure 8.
Select
Export as Excel
to export the search results from the EBP Billers Listing into Excel. If
Include Biller in Hint Text
is selected, the exported file includes English and French hint text for each biller. If itГўВҖВҷs not selected, the biller list is exported in the existing format without hint text.
Note:	The Biller Report is colour-coded to indicate the status of the billers (green = new, yellow = updated, and red = deleted).
Figure 8: Biller Updates
END
